mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HR_EXPERIENCE_INSIDE T WHERE T.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.ACTIVITY IN ('0','1')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, A.* FROM ( SELECT T.SEQ, T.PERSON_ID, T.TRANS_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.TRANS_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS TRANS_CODE_NAME, T.START_DATE, T.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(T.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, T.EMP_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.EMP_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS EMP_TYPE_NAME, T.EMPLOYEE_BELONG, T.EMP_OFFICE, T.END_PROBATION_DATE, T.POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, T.POST_FAMILY, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.POST_FAMILY, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_FAMILY_NAME, T.JOB_TYPE, T.DUTY_NO, T.WORK_HOUR_TYPE, T.WAGE_TYPE, T.REMARK, T.ACTIVITY, T.POSITION_NO, T.MAIN_BUSINESS, T.TRANS_RESOURCE, T.COST_CENTER, T.PAY_STEP_NO, T.POSITION, TO_CHAR(T.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS CREATE_DATE, T.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(T.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, T.UPDATED_BY, E.EMPID, E.LOCAL_NAME FROM HR_EXPERIENCE_INSIDE T LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON E.PERSON_ID = T.PERSON_ID WHERE T.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.ACTIVITY IN ('0','1') ORDER BY TO_DATE(T.START_DATE,'DD.MM.YYYY') DESC, T.CREATE_DATE DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + #{length, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) WHERE RN > #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT T.SEQ, T.PERSON_ID, T.TRANS_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.TRANS_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS TRANS_CODE_NAME, T.START_DATE, T.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(T.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, T.EMP_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.EMP_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS EMP_TYPE_NAME, T.EMPLOYEE_BELONG, T.EMP_OFFICE, T.END_PROBATION_DATE, T.POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, T.POST_FAMILY, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.POST_FAMILY, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_FAMILY_NAME, T.JOB_TYPE, T.DUTY_NO, T.WORK_HOUR_TYPE, T.WAGE_TYPE, T.REMARK, T.ACTIVITY, T.POSITION_NO, T.MAIN_BUSINESS, T.TRANS_RESOURCE, T.COST_CENTER, T.PAY_STEP_NO, T.POSITION, TO_CHAR(T.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS CREATE_DATE, T.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(T.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, T.UPDATED_BY, E.EMPID, E.LOCAL_NAME FROM HR_EXPERIENCE_INSIDE T LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON E.PERSON_ID = T.PERSON_ID WHERE T.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.ACTIVITY IN ('0','1') ORDER BY TO_DATE(T.START_DATE,'DD.MM.YYYY') DESC, T.CREATE_DATE DESC

SELECT T.SEQ, T.PERSON_ID, T.TRANS_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.TRANS_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS TRANS_CODE_NAME, T.START_DATE, T.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(T.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, T.EMP_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.EMP_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS EMP_TYPE_NAME, T.EMPLOYEE_BELONG, T.EMP_OFFICE, T.END_PROBATION_DATE, T.POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, T.POST_FAMILY, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.POST_FAMILY, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_FAMILY_NAME, T.JOB_TYPE, T.DUTY_NO, T.WORK_HOUR_TYPE, T.WAGE_TYPE, T.REMARK, T.ACTIVITY, T.POSITION_NO, T.MAIN_BUSINESS, T.TRANS_RESOURCE, T.COST_CENTER, T.PAY_STEP_NO, T.POSITION, TO_CHAR(T.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS CREATE_DATE, T.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(T.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, T.UPDATED_BY, E.EMPID, E.LOCAL_NAME FROM HR_EXPERIENCE_INSIDE T LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON E.PERSON_ID = T.PERSON_ID WHERE T.SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert:
SELECT HR_EXP_INSID_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO HR_EXPERIENCE_INSIDE ( SEQ, PERSON_ID, TRANS_CODE, START_DATE, DEPTNO, EMP_TYPE_CODE, EMPLOYEE_BELONG, EMP_OFFICE, END_PROBATION_DATE, POST_GRADE_NO, POST_FAMILY, JOB_TYPE, DUTY_NO, WORK_HOUR_TYPE, WAGE_TYPE, REMARK, ACTIVITY, POSITION_NO, MAIN_BUSINESS, TRANS_RESOURCE, COST_CENTER, PAY_STEP_NO, POSITION, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeBelong, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empOffice, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endProbationDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postGradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postFamily, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dutyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workHourType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wageType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0', #{positionNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mainBusiness, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transResource, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payStepNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_EXPERIENCE_INSIDE SET TRANS_CODE = #{transCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_DATE = #{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPTNO = #{deptno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMP_TYPE_CODE = #{empTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMPLOYEE_BELONG = #{employeeBelong, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMP_OFFICE = #{empOffice, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, END_PROBATION_DATE= #{endProbationDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POST_GRADE_NO = #{postGradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POST_FAMILY = #{postFamily, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JOB_TYPE = #{jobType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DUTY_NO = #{dutyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_HOUR_TYPE = #{workHourType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WAGE_TYPE = #{wageType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POSITION_NO = #{positionNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAIN_BUSINESS = #{mainBusiness, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRANS_RESOURCE = #{transResource, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COST_CENTER = #{costCenter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAY_STEP_NO = #{payStepNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POSITION = #{position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
